results.headline: Smoothies That Keep Up With Your Morning
results.text_preview: Smoothies That Keep Up With Your Morning Powerful blending in seconds — fruits, ice, and greens turn silky smooth for a …
results.manual_notes: "healthy" triggers TH health-claim scrutiny (Food Act B.E. 2522 Sec. 40, FDA Thailand pre-approval for food benefit/quality claims). Recommend replacing with "fast, energizing start" or obtaining FDA Thailand ad approval before production use.

findings.summary: Health implication: feel/experience cues (lighter, fresher, nutrient retention) without disease/organ claims — qualify context or attach data (WARN)
分界：健康暗示（Health Implication）说的是感受与体验；医疗宣称说的是疾病与器官功能。本条为健康暗示 — 须语境限定或软化，必要时附数据；少油/营养保留类须持有对比或测试数据。

results.rationale: Warning issued based on: RULE/demo-apac-sa-health-implication (MEDIUM); PLAYBOOK/sa-health-implication (MEDIUM). Manual follow-up recommended before publishing.

results.headline: More Power, Less Counter Space
results.text_preview: More Power, Less Counter Space A compact blender built for small kitchens without cutting corners on performance. See De…
results.manual_notes: Revised after engine cross-check (2026-07-03): "More Power" is a comparative claim with no stated baseline (same pattern as Safer/Stronger/Faster/More efficient). Needs a comparator (e.g. "vs. our previous model") or supporting spec data, otherwise soften to non-comparative wording (e.g. "Powerful Enough for Small Kitchens"). Originally rated green in R01 — corrected on review.
results.rationale: No blocking or warning findings across Rule, Playbook, Case, Open Risk, or Vision modules.

findings.summary: Absolute claim: unconditional guarantees (best, first, never, zero-fault) without verifiable basis — may pass with audited substantiation (WARN/BLOCKER by term)
Absolute or omnibus claims (e.g. zero waste, zero-fault, never look back, every serving, 每一次) require qualification and substantiation
Absolute or omnibus performance wording detected. Qualify the claim (conditions, typical results) or provide substantiation before publishing.

results.rationale: Warning issued based on: RULE/demo-apac-sa-absolute-claim (MEDIUM); RULE/demo-apac-sa-absolute-claim-soft (MEDIUM); PLAYBOOK/sa-absolute-performance (MEDIUM). Manual follow-up recommended before publishing.
